flashcards.definition: A gas consisting of single atoms (He, Ne, Ar — noble gases).
A gas whose molecules consist of two atoms (H₂, O₂, N₂, F₂, Cl₂, Br₂, I₂).
The seven diatomic elements: H₂, N₂, O₂, F₂, Cl₂, Br₂, I₂ (BrINClHOF).
A hypothetical gas whose particles have no volume and no intermolecular forces.
Gases expand to fill containers, are compressible, and exert pressure.
